zh.lifeSummary: 當Shaw Oig Mackintosh 2nd of Clan Mackintosh於大約1150年出生在蘇格蘭時，他的父親Shaw Mac in Toisich MacDuff 1st Chief of Clan Mackintosh27歲，母親Giles de Montgomery22歲。他和Mary Sandilands至少有6個兒子。他去世於1209年12月10日在英國蘇格蘭享年60歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Shaw Oig Mackintosh 2nd of Clan Mackintosh于大约1150年出生在苏格兰时，他的父亲Shaw Mac in Toisich MacDuff 1st Chief of Clan Mackintosh27岁，母亲Giles de Montgomery22岁。他和Mary Sandilands至少有6个儿子。他去世于1209年12月10日在英国苏格兰享年60岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Mackintosh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McIntosh
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Toisich ‘son of the chief’. Compare Mackintosh .

History: Clan Mackintosh is a Highland Scottish clan claiming descent from Shaw McDuff, a 12th-century chief (second son of Duncan, Earl of Fife), who established the traditional family seat at Perry, Morays. The chiefs of Clan Mackintosh have been regarded as leaders of the Chattan Confederation since 1291.

nameMeanings.name: Shaw
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, in origin a local name meaning ‘wood, copse’ (Old English sceaga, Old Norse skógr).

nameMeanings.name: Oig
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ramesh, Sushil, Anjana, Ashok, Deepak, Madan, Naresh, Pradeep, Praveen, Rajneesh, Rakesh, Renuka.
Indian (Punjab): Khatri and Sikh name of unexplained etymology.
Hungarian: from Hungarian víg ‘happy’, ‘cheerful’, hence a nickname for a funny or happy-go-lucky person.

variants.name: Vik
meanings: Short form of   Vivian   and   Vivien .

variants.name: Wiig
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Hilmer.
Norwegian and Danish: variant of   Vig  .

variants.name: Vigh
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Sandor, Istvan, Ildiko, Laszlo, Tibor.

en.lifeSummary: When Shaw Oig Mackintosh 2nd of Clan Mackintosh was born about 1150, in Scotland, his father, Shaw Mac in Toisich MacDuff 1st Chief of Clan Mackintosh, was 27 and his mother, Giles de Montgomery, was 22. He had at least 6 sons with Mary Sandilands. He died on 10 December 1209, in Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 60, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Shaw Oig Mackintosh 2nd of Clan Mackintosh est né environ 1150, à Écosse, son père, Shaw Mac in Toisich MacDuff 1st Chief of Clan Mackintosh, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Giles de Montgomery, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils avec Mary Sandilands. Il est décédé le 10 décembre 1209, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Shaw Oig Mackintosh 2nd of Clan Mackintosh um 1150 in Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Shaw Mac in Toisich MacDuff 1st Chief of Clan Mackintosh 27 und seine Mutter Giles de Montgomery 22. Er hatte mit Mary Sandilands mindestens 6 Söhne. Er starb am 10. Dezember 1209 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Shaw Oig Mackintosh 2nd of Clan Mackintosh è nato il circa 1150 nel Scotland, il suo padre, Shaw Mac in Toisich MacDuff 1st Chief of Clan Mackintosh, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Giles de Montgomery, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli con Mary Sandilands. Morì il 10 dicembre 1209, nel Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Shaw Oig Mackintosh 2nd of Clan Mackintoshが約1150年にスコットランドで生まれた時，父Shaw Mac in Toisich MacDuff 1st Chief of Clan Mackintoshは27歳，母Giles de Montgomeryは22歳であった。彼はMary Sandilandsとの間に少なくとも6人の息子をもうけた。彼は1209年12月10日にイギリススコットランドで60歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Shaw Oig Mackintosh 2nd of Clan Mackintosh(이)가 대략 1150년 스컷랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Shaw Mac in Toisich MacDuff 1st Chief of Clan Mackintosh(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Giles de Montgomery(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Mary Sandilands(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1209년 12월 10일 영국 스코틀랜드에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Shaw Oig Mackintosh 2nd of Clan Mackintosh nasceu aproximadamente 1150, em Scotland, seu pai, Shaw Mac in Toisich MacDuff 1st Chief of Clan Mackintosh, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Giles de Montgomery, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos com Mary Sandilands. Ele faleceu em 10 de dezembro de 1209, em Escócia, United Kingdom, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Shaw Oig Mackintosh 2nd of Clan Mackintosh родился около 1150 г. в местности Шотландия, его отцу по имени Shaw Mac in Toisich MacDuff 1st Chief of Clan Mackintosh было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Giles de Montgomery, 22. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей от Mary Sandilands. Он умер 10 декабря 1209 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

sm.from 1150 to 1209: mai le 1150 e o'o I le 1209

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Shaw Oig Mackintosh 2nd of Clan Mackintosh nació aproximadamente 1150, en Scotland, su papá, Shaw Mac in Toisich MacDuff 1st Chief of Clan Mackintosh, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Giles de Montgomery, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos con Mary Sandilands. Murió el 10 de diciembre de 1209, en Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
